series_metadata.series_description: Contains records of Violation Sanctions Process (VSP) hearings including the Notice of Findings, Sanction Receipt, Revocation Order, Hearing Data Sheet and Hearing Officer Report.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper file pending Post Revocation Hearing, if applicable, then image. ; Electronic: Retain for ten years after death, final release, maximum expiration of sentence, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
